description_long: This is a pair of athletic sneakers featuring a vibrant purple upper with blue accents and white soles. The shoes have a modern, sporty design with a low-cut profile and a slightly raised heel for added support. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, providing a secure fit. Black details are visible on the heel tab and side, adding contrast to the overall color scheme. The soles appear to be made of rubber with a textured grip for traction, suitable for urban environments. The shoes look clean, unworn, and structurally intact, indicating they are in new condition.
description: A pair of modern purple athletic sneakers with blue accents, white laces, and textured white soles, featuring black detailing and a sporty design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and the symmetrical design of both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue accent, black heel tab, and the side logo detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel tabs and the back curvature of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue accent, black heel tab, and the side logo detail mirrored from the left.
